entry.title: #CoE#BUMA - Item price has not changed in the catalog Error upon creation of Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
Hi,

We attempted to populate the material number using the BAdI (MMPUR_OCI_ITEM_TRANSFER_DATA - Change of OCI 4.0 Data When Mapping to a Purchase Requisition Item), but when trying to place an order through the external catalog and completed the details in Purchase requisition app then clicked "Create" PR, we received an error message stating, "The price for item 00010 has changed in the catalog. Update item price." Please note that this material number has an associated Purchasing Info Record.

Is there a way not to encounter this error and proceed with the creation of PR?

Regards!

John

entry.title: Re: IDOC Structure - Field level detail
entry.content:
I run WE02 to see the field descriptions for the segments. Where can I see what the columns represent in the idoc itself?

I see this information, which isn't entirely useful. 

How does it map to the Number and Application Data columns in the iDoc. How do I know what each row (number?) and value represent?

entry.title: SKU: 8017496 (SAP HANA, EE Cloud, upgrade, private edition)
entry.content:
Hello experts, do you know what is the purpose for this SKU: 8017496 (SAP HANA, EE Cloud, upgrade, private edition.)

In the  UnofficialPAM the description is a License, and the customer has a BOM with this SKU: do you have some examples? the BOM only includes this SKU (related to HANA EE)

8017496SAP HANA, EE Cloud, upgrade, private editionUpsellLicenseGeneric Private CloudUpgrades HANA use rights of S/4HANA Enterprise Management. Please note that customer may require Data Provisioning Agent in most cases (already included with S/4HANA EM and installed on-demand basis).
XSA is included on request only.

and yet this SKU mentions that the DP agent is included by default.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Query in Sap b1 Hana with parameters
entry.content:
Hi @ramco1917 ,

You can take help from the below post.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/sap-b1-hana-query-with-date-parameter-in-variable/qaq-p/13916446 

Thanks.

Manish

entry.title: Re: Active/Active Read enabled option
entry.content:
Hi Imran_94,

According to the screen shot, the error happens to the license in ABAP system (T-code: slicense), not HANA DB. So you may need to request a new valid license for ABAP system.

Below KBA describes a different scenario, but I think you can still refer to the steps there.
2413104 - How to replace a license key for hardware exchange (hardware key changed)

Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: Re: Data Services encountered an error while reading real...
entry.content: you can find more details of Real-time Jobs in this document https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATA_SERVICES/e54136ab6a4a43e6a370265bf0a2d744/5739433a6d6d1014b3fc9283b0e91070.html?q=real+time+job

entry.title: Re: How to Create Workflows that Require Multilevel Approval
entry.content:
Hello Alice, 

Thank you for your sharing. I have one question. 

There is a requirement to request for approval on 1 group containing with 3 recipients. If 2 of 3 recipients have approved, then PO will be released. However if only 1 person approves and 2 person reject the PO, then PO status will be rejected. 

Currently in flexible workflow only have 2 options of step to be completed : one of the recipients or all the recipients. But now the requirement is 2 of 3 approve the PO, the PO status will be released. 

Regards,
Fenny

entry.title: Re: SAP_IPA_28014: The requested Document Information Ext...
entry.content: Hi, The aforementioned error when creating a document template has been resolved, but it is still not possible to use the Extract data (pre-trained model) option in automations. I tried to build two projects and they both get stuck at the data extraction point.

entry.title: Integration Suite - Standard Edition - Multiple Tenants
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

My question: Can we purchase more than one tenants for Standard Edition in Integration Suite?

I have checked SAP Note (https://me.sap.com/notes/2903776) and it says other than Premium Edition being 4 tenants granted, the other editions, standard edition and basic edition included, only have 1 tenant.

However, on SAP's website, it implies that every edition is applicable for additional tenants.

So, are we able to purchase multiple tenants for basic/standard edition?

 

Thank you.

entry.title: /SCWM/ISU can't post with external amount
entry.content:
Hello,

As per 2021 Released for EWM we can posting migration stock with amount. I've tried to input this amount but no material document is created. How to resolve this ?

 

Best regards,

 

EWM - Goods Movement EWM - Basic Functions

entry.title: Re: How can I restrict certain rows from being completely uneditable in maintenance view?
entry.content: I'm not sure if this requirement can be achieved through events, but I have basically implemented this function through PBO, although it is not perfect.

entry.title: Re: Tile cannot be loaded in SAP Build workzone, standard edition. Error while loading Component.js
entry.content:
Thanks Mio.

This helped to resolve my first error as well. I was getting similar error, and adding section property "sap.cloud" in manifest.json loaded the app.

However, there is another problem, the metadata file is not loaded ! In console, the error is .... Failed to get contexts for ../lcapbomcap.comdassapbomcustomerenquiry/~8809a3d6-8196-4551-9763-47f8a3a8e9d8~/service/bomCapService/CustomerEnquiry with start index 0 and length 100 - Error: Could not load metadata: 500 error at Object.createError (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.130.2/resources/sap/ui/core/library-preload.js:2322:3887) .

On checking the Application error logs, it shows "Error while retrieving destination DIRECT_SERVICE_BINDING from destination service. HTTP status code: 404". On checking the mta.yaml file, there is no DIRECT_SERVICE_BINDING destination".  So how to validate what is the correct destination name to be maintained in xs-app.json.

Thanks, Varad

entry.title: Re: How to restrict some fields from editing like Amount...
entry.content:
Hi JPIND,

According to product help

The MIRO app will be replaced by the successor app Manage Supplier Invoices (F0859). I would recommend that you can check related authorization objects in IAM if it can meet your request.

Br, Bob

entry.title: Does anyone know what information needs to be prepared when connecting the Indeed job posting?
entry.content:
When we check the Indeed job board in the manage recruiting posting, they only need to provide the name and the duration of the job offer. Unlike other job boards, no special client ID is needed so I am wondering if there is extra information that we need to prepare. Is there anyone that can share their successful experience? Thanks.

Best Regards,

Bella.

entry.title: Re: Add additional recipients to the email notification when a Purchase Requisition is approved
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: How to read environment variable of project of SAP Build Process Automation in Script Task
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are trying to read the environment variable of project of SAP Build Process Automation in Script Task. But so far as we know, we can only read Custom Variables, Process Inputs, Process Metadata and API data...

Is there any solution to get environment variable in Script Task? Thank you.

Best regards,
Weiss

entry.title: Trigger event lost in Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi community,

I have configured Event Mesh (in Integration Suite) and SAP Build Process Automation to start a process when a journal entiry is created in S/4HANA on-premise.

A webhook subscription has been created in Event Mesh, and the handshake was successful.

 

A process has been created with an event trigger, and deployed.

When a journal entry is created in S/4HANA, the number of t"Message Queued" increased to 1, and soon decreased to 0. This indicates that the message was sent to the webhook (Build Process Automation).

However, no process started in Build Process Automation. Now I am wondering where the message has gone.

Monitoroing > Event Aquisition > Business Events shows no data.

Could anyone tell me where such "lost" events can be monitored and investigated?

Best regards,

Mio Yasutake

entry.title: Digital Skills Innitiatives
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano

I hope you are doing well. I recently learned about your Digital Skills Initiative and am truly inspired by the opportunities it offers.

Living in Pakistan, I have limited access to programs like this due to financial challenges, but I am deeply committed to learning and growing. This course aligns perfectly with my career goals, and I am confident it will equip me with the digital skills needed to secure better job opportunities and make a positive impact.

If given the chance, I will dedicate myself wholeheartedly to the program and apply the knowledge effectively in my professional journey. Thank you for considering my request, and I hope to be part of this incredible initiative.

Best regards,
[Amna Bashir ]
[About AmnaT123 - SAP Community]

entry.title: Re: Add digital signature in Purchase order form in sap p...
entry.content:
This requirement can also be realized with integration to use SAP Forms Service by Adobe .

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/output-management-solutions-for-lobs-in-sap-business-technology-platform-to/ba-p/13944056

entry.title: PR not generate after run MRP for spare
entry.content: Suppose we have a fg material order and mrp type is pd and stregy type is 20,and we have also one spare requirement we have save mrp type pd and strgy type is 10 ,in both material we have set induvidual requirement blank ,we have rm stock but after mrp run system will not consider stock ,but we need to consider it in that case ,we need resolution what configuration we have skip so that we can check it properly and configure accordingly ,share complete procedure along with configuration in sap s/4 hana public cloud

entry.title: Re: #SAPCAP: Understanding CQL Queries (Node.js)
entry.content:
Hi Ajit , 

How can I write below query in cap? could you help me

SELECT name
FROM students
WHERE standard = '7'
  AND ((  enrollDate <= '2024-12-31' ) or (enrollDate = '2024-01-01' AND section IN ('A', 'B', 'D'))or (enrollDate >= '2024-01-01' AND section = 'A' AND score > 90))

entry.title: Re: 物料凭证过账，如何自动勾选 打印输出控制
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: Custom Situation Cases: Configure a Complex Case (6/6)
entry.content: To answer my own question: Yes, there are Jobs that have to be set up. For custom situations, the name of the job is: SIT2_RT_BATCH. For standard situations the job name is SIT_TECH_JOB_BATCH_DAILY but I believe this one is usually set in the system by default (not the case for the custom situations job). In my system, the jobs are set to run every 30 minutes.

entry.title: Re: Dispatcher, YELLOW, Running but Message Server unreac...
entry.content:
Hi Maladri,

Could you share the log file dev_disp?

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: How can I restrict certain rows from being completely uneditable in maintenance view?
entry.content:
There are events to handle the selection/read of record to display, considering if it may be possible to add some where criteria when in update mode (e.g. date > today) so only allowed records are displayed.

Changing the logic of the dynpro is possible, but if somebody unaware of this in the future someway regenerate the dialog, then your modification will be lost 😥

xs-app.json file :

Varad

entry.title: Re: how to implement to method IF_EX_FAGL_COND_ACC_ASSIGN...
entry.content:
This BAdI was created initially for report FAGL_YEC_POSTINGS_EHP4, don't know for the italian version.

Note 3447864 - FAGL_IT_02: missing "other parameter" tab seems to indicate it is called, can you try again, check activation, filter, conditions, etc.

entry.title: Re: Error when checking package SMLT - Language installation
entry.content:
Hello 

According to the SAP note 3129901, have you downloaded the language pack as mentioned below?

SAP ERP 6.0 EHP8 Language II 1/2 (51050610_4 / 51050610_LNG2_part1.exe)
SAP ERP 6.0 EHP8 Language II 2/2 (51050610_5 / 51050610_LNG2_part2.rar)

Regards

SS

entry.title: Creating Offline-Capable SAPUI5 Applications Using IndexedDB and Local Storage On premises.
entry.content:
Introduction

Offline functionalities in SAPUI5 applications are crucial when users need to work without a continuous internet connection. The idea is to enable the application to function as seamlessly as possible even when it's offline, syncing data when the connection is restored. Here I want to discuss offline capabilities of SAP UI5 application using IndexedDB and Local Storage. We can able to create fully functional offline applications/Hybrid applications but here I’m demonstrating SAP UI5 application with offline capabilities in any kind of on premises systems without using ECC/HANA servers. By using local data/ Local Storage Data and IndexedDB data with object (navigator) we are differentiating offline and online data storage with Local Storage and IndexedDB respectively.

Prerequisites

  1. SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) or SAP Web IDE or VS Code for development.
  2. Familiarity with SAPUI5 basics, JavaScript, and storage concepts (Local Storage/Session Storage/IndexedDB).

    Overview of Offline Storage Options

    SAPUI5 provides two main ways to manage data offline:

    Local Storage: Local Storage in JavaScript allows web applications to store data locally within the user's browser with no expiration date. The data isn't deleted when the browser is closed, and is available when the browser is opened again. Here we are using local storage to store data when application is online.

    IndexedDB: IndexedDB is a client-side storage mechanism that can store significant amounts of structured data, including files. Using IndexedDB for SAPUI5 apps allows for more control over offline data storage. It is a common way to cache API responses or persist data during offline scenarios. IndexedDB allows creating databases, object stores, and performing CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations. This approach is useful when you want to store specific data structures locally, like JSON responses from APIs, and access them when the app is offline. Here we are using indexedDB to store data when application is offline.

     

    Creating the SAPUI5 Application: Here we are working with Business Application Studio. We need to create a basic SAP UI5 application from template.

    File->new project from template -> select SAP fiori/ui5 basic free style applicationànext ->Data Service and Service Selection(if required need to give OData service selection otherwise select none) -> next->Entity Selection(View name)->next->Project Attributes (Module name, Application title, namespace, description, folder path, Deployment Configuration and FLP Configuration)->finish.

    Given application as “OfflineUI5App”.

    Now I want to create a View with basic form template with input field and two buttons. One button is “Save Data” to save data in local storage/IndexedDB and one more button is to “Load Data” to load data from local storage/IndexedDB. And one text field to show the loaded data on screen.

    View1.view.xml:

    Now we can see the required layout in our application as view.

    Implementing the Controller Logic:

    In View1.controller.js file we are going to implement key functions like “onSave”, “onLoad”, “openDatabase”, “saveNoteOffline” , and “getNoteOffline”.

    Checking Network Status

    Use `navigator.onLine` to detect online/offline status.

    Creating the `onSave` and `onLoad` Functions:

    onSave: onSave function is used to collect the data from input field and saving it to local storage when application is online, to IndexedDB when application is offline by checking network status.

    onLoad: onLoad function is used to load the data from local storage when application is online and from IndexedDB when application is offline.

    Code for onSave and onLoad functions:

    IndexedDB Functions

    Code for initializing and working with IndexedDB:

    Testing the Application

    To verify functionality, test both online and offline scenarios:

    Save data to localStorage when online.

    By clicking on load data button, data will be fetching from localStorage.

    Saving Data to IndexedDB when offline.

    By clicking on load data button data is fetching from indexedDB.

    Conclusion

    Using `localStorage` and `IndexedDB` in SAPUI5 enables effective offline data management. This documentation covers only offline capabilities of a SAPUI5 application with offline persistence. This is just an introduction to offline capabilities of SAP UI5 applications. Further to implementing offline capabilities in SAPUI5 applications requires a combination of OData offline models, local storage techniques, service workers, and potentially custom synchronization logic. Each method has its strengths depending on the use case and the amount of data that needs to be stored offline. These techniques ensure a smooth user experience by allowing users to continue working without an internet connection and seamlessly synchronizing when the network is available again. Further we are going to explore complete robust offline capable or hybrid applications with OData offline models, local storage techniques, service workers, and potentially custom synchronization logic.

entry.title: Re: PR not generate after run MRP for spare
entry.content:
Added Procure tag. Please remove other tags.

Suggest you to read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Cost Center - Budget Availability Control
entry.content:
Hi Arafat,

I appreciate this blog. I noticed in your testing that you used a single account assignment with a budget-carrying cost center in the PO and did the actual posting via the service entry sheet, which is being checked by the cost center budget control. I have a question, though. Currently, my team is working on an S/4HANA implementation project and utilizing this cost center budgeting functionality for our client's business process. The budget upload is done via the Import Financial Plan Data Fiori app, where the cost center budget template file can be downloaded. To fill out the cost center budget template file, the following parameters are required: 'Plan Category', 'G/L Fiscal Year', 'Posting Period', 'Company Code', 'Cost Center', 'G/L Account Number', 'Amount in Company Code Currency', and 'Company Code Currency'. Each line item in the template file corresponds to a cost element and cost center. For example,

PlanCat    G/L FY   Period  CoCode    CostCntr          G/LAcctNo.    Amt in CoCode   CoCode Currncy
 
BUDGET02    2024     1       1000       ZADMIN_HQ     61000360       1000000            PHP
BUDGET02    2024     10     1000       ZADMIN_HQ     61000200       1000000            PHP
BUDGET02    2024     11     1000       ZADMIN_HQ     61000500       1000000            PHP


I have been testing the cost center budget control functionality by posting common costs (e.g., water, electricity, rental) using cost elements (expense G/L accounts) associated with a budget-carrying cost center via the Manage Journal Entries Fiori app. During document simulation, the budget control check triggers once the total debits exceed the 90% tolerance limit (current configuration), causing a warning message that 90% of the budget has been exceeded, but posting is still allowed. Similarly, the budget control check also triggers when the total debits exceed the 100% set tolerance limit, causing an error message, and posting is not allowed by the system. For example,

  • Total Budget: 3,000,000.
  • Actual Debits per cost element: 1,000,000 + 800,000 + 1,000,000 = 2,800,000.
    • 90% Tolerance: 2,700,000 → Warning triggered.
    • 100% Limit: 3,000,000 → Error budget exceeded.

       

      Now here's the dilemma. The cost center budget check functionality I explained above does not meet the expectations or requirements of our client, as they want the budget control to be cost-element specific, not aggregated. See the example below:

      Per Cost Element

      If cost center budget control is based on per GL account:

      • Budget checks:
        • Cost element 1 → Budget: 1,000,000, Actual: 900,100 → Budget check triggers. 
        • Cost element 2 → Budget: 1,000,000, Actual: 800,000 → No budget check.
        • Cost element 3 → Budget: 1,000,000, Actual: 1,000,001 → Budget check triggers. 


          With this in mind, is it possible to configure the cost center budget control check functionality to make it cost-element specific or based on individual GL accounts rather than an aggregated budget? It would be of great help if you could provide a solution. I am looking forward to your response, as my team is currently in the UAT phase, and our client is not satisfied with the current setup of the cost center budget functionality in the system.



          Best regards,
          AL

entry.title: Re: Annual Sales List - Belgium
entry.content: Informed expert.

entry.title: Re: Use product lifecycle management in ABC XYZ segmentation
entry.content: Thank you Steffen, Yes. Generating data for key figure based on reference product data and then calculating ABC/XYZ value is possible, but I am trying to find an answer for why one should use option in segmentation profile "consider product lifecycle management". Even without selecting that option PLM will populate data for KF based on reference given

entry.title: Re: How to get certificate to Enable Certificate-Based Au...
entry.content:
What certificate and where to get it is determined by your identity provider (IdP).  When the Identity provider is called it determines what is acceptable for authenticating a user if that is a certificate, user/password, multi-factor etc.  Typically when using certificate authentication, the devices are under MDM control and the certificates are automatically installed by the MDM and used by the IdP then to confirm identity.

I would suggest starting with your IdP group and discussing certificate authentication options and requirements with them.

entry.title: Re: RE-Fx flow type involved when a contract is interrupt...
entry.content:
Hi,

For asset retirements resulting in a loss, the standard SAP content typically utilizes the flow types "Profit from Change +ve", or "Loss from Change -ve". The specific asset transaction type will depend on whether the termination and associated loss occurred in the current year or a previous year.

BR,

Achyuth reddy K

entry.title: Re: SAP S4 HANA public cloud business user creation quest...
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: The use of CDS Entity I_TextObjectPlainLongText is not permitted
entry.content:
I need to make amendment in RFQ std. form MM_PUR_RFQ_INTERNAL to display Header and Item Text.

So I have copied this form and making changes. To get the data I am doing BADI implementation of MM_PUR_S4_RFQ_MODIFY_PRINT_HDR & MM_PUR_S4_RFQ_MODIFY_PRINT_ITM .

I found one CDS  I_TextObjectPlainLongText to fetch the required text but it is not permitted to be used in BADI implementation

Please suggest alternate way to read Item and Header text for the RFQ.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: The use of CDS Entity I_TextObjectPlainLongText is no...
entry.content:
Please recheck the business contexts referring this help document content:  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/5db606b1c5a0459ab07ffed4661e42b8.html?locale=en-US

Key users can extend the app Manage RFQs in the Custom Fields app and the Custom Logic app using the following business contexts:

  • Procurement: Purchasing Document
  • Procurement: Purchasing Document Item

After creating your custom field with the text type you wanted, please refer FIELD TYPE 3: – ADD NEW CUSTOM FIELD TO FORM  of this blog to set the output setting:  https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/s-4hana-cloud-output-management-purchase-order/ba-p/12840660, this blog introduce the PO example, you can use this as a reference, the RFQ is set up similarly.

Then, please refer this blog to set the configuration and the field binding in Adobe LiveCycle Designer.

For the further coding for subsequent feature development and logic editing, you will need to contact your development team.

entry.title: QM Audit Management Automatic control in procurement.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Can we control procurement using QM's audit management? Specifically, how can we automatically block procurement for a vendor or material if an audit fails without accessing any other quality transaction code?

entry.title: Re: sysprocesses memusage column
entry.content:
Hello,

The value of memusage is not the cumulative memory, it only returns the current memory usage of that process. It can go up and down according to the memory allocated to the process.

memusage

int

Amount of memory allocated to process.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ASE/ad4a1ddf1bf34768841bd09d1eddf434/ab95627fbc2b1014977ecd5d03ccbc32.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Getting "Vocab validation failed" for URI error
entry.content:
Hi ,

Please add /sap/opu/odata/IWFND/ in cloud connector.

We had similar issue and was resolved after adding the resource path. Let me know if this worked for you as well or not.

Regards,

Anjana ER

entry.title: Customer & Partner Roundtable for SAP BTP ABAP Environment #19
entry.content:
👉 The call for contributions for one of the upcoming roundtables is open! 

 

If you want to show a demo or share a use case scenario for SAP BTP ABAP Environment send us an email and we will get back to you.
 

Introduction

 

As SAP BTP ABAP environment (aka Steampunk) and ABAP Cloud became more popular inside and outside of SAP, there is a high demand for rolling out the latest product news and updates, asking questions, and showing demos. 

💡 You can find the slides presented, recordings, and further references from the previous roundtables in this GitHub repository.


Meeting Information

When:                                                                      
  • January 21st, 10:00 - 11:00 AM CET  – Zoom Meeting (please register in advance) 
 
Who:
  • All interested customers, partners, and stakeholders are invited to join this roundtable
  • BTP ABAP team:Frank Jentsch (Product Lead for SAP BTP ABAP Environment), Alexander Rother (Head of BTP ABAP product management), Jens Weiler, Jasmin Gruschke, Sebastian Baskovich,  Iwona Hahn, Burcu Karlidag, Ronny Pahlke, Nora Klemp

Preliminary Agenda:
  • Product update for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
  • Joule's ABAP Developer capabilities - use cases, the generative AI road map, insights 
  • Q&A 
Looking forward to meeting you!
 


Check out our SAP Business Technology ABAP Environment page in SAP Community for product updates and upcoming events.

entry.title: BAPI to change maintenance task list
entry.content:
Hi All , 

Tried to use BDC, LSMW to change task list en masse but was not successful . Can any one please suggest any BAPI or other available features on S4 hana cloud to change task list ( equipment task list, general task list ) in mass  .  

Thanking you .

Best Regards 

Mohammed

entry.title: Re: Handling mandatory fields in a multi-country environment in SuccessFactors Recruiting

entry.content:
Hello

Please check if you can access SAP Discovery Center

Using two tenants is recommended: one for testing and one for productive

 

Regards

Abhijit

entry.title: Re: Joule – Getting Started with Document Grounding - setup guide
entry.content:
Hello Shailesh, 

Thank you for the amazing blog. Based on the architecture diagram it might be possible to call Documentgrounding service directly from custom application ( which is already connected to LLM ) . am i right?

If so any idea where can we find documentation on this? because for now all documentations points to using either Joule or Generative AI hub ( orchestration ) to connect with documentgrounding. but missing direct calling of this service. 

Thank you in advance. 

Regards

entry.title: Re: PAPM on premise Duplicated Activities in Process Mana...
entry.content:
Dear Juan,

I understand that you are encountering issues with creating a Process Instance as it is getting duplicated. May I request to kindly raise an OSS incident for this since this needs to be checked further if a bug or a misconfiguration. You can follow the steps on creating an OSS through this SAP Note 1339209 - Best practices for creating a support case.

Thanks and best regards,
Kevin

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA移行と継続的な改善を支援：SAP Signavio Process Insightsを活用した業務プロセス分析
entry.content:
既存システムからS/4HANA へ移行する目的として、ビジネス環境と技術の変化に対して業務プロセスを適応させて改善とイノベーションを継続的に実現できるようにすることがあります。そのS/4HANAを基盤とした業務改善のために活用できるソリューションの一つがSAP Signavio Process Insightsです。SAP Signavio Process Insightsを使用すると、現状のERP やS/4HANAと接続してその活用実態、業務フローと関連するデータの流れを明確にし、業務実行のパフォーマンス評価指標、社内および業界平均とのベンチマーク比較、ボトルネック（阻害要因）の把握、改善のための推奨施策等の情報を得られます。

また保守契約のあるお客様が無償で利用できる、限定された項目でのワンタイム分析として、SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition も提供されています。本番システムにノートを適用してデータを抽出し、サイトにアップロードすると、SAPによって分析レポートが生成されます。discovery editionは1つのプロセスフロー選択に限定された分析のため、S/4HANA移行の初期の取り組みのなかで移行価値をディスカッションするきっかけ等の目的で活用できます。

実際にProcess Insightsを使用してどのような情報が得られるのかを実際の画面を例にして見ていきます。

プロセスフローと阻害要因、パフォーマンス指標の分析
ソーシングから支払い（Source to Pay）やリードから入金（Lead to Cash）といったエンドトゥエンドのプロセス内の様々なプロセスフローに対して、処理完了率や完了までの日数、業務処理実行のパフォーマンスを低下させている阻害要因を可視化します。以下はLead to Cashのプロセスフローを表示した例です。

関連する詳細フローをクリックすると詳細にドリルダウンします。例えば「販売伝票請求からFI-AR（債権）消込まで」を選択します。以下のような詳細な情報が表示されます。

販売伝票作成からFI-AR伝票の作成、そして消込という業務フローのそれぞれの段階において、完了率や阻害要因がわかります。特に赤字で示されている指標の値が悪く、プロセスフローのパフォーマンスに影響を及ぼしている阻害要因です。これらをクリックするとさらにその阻害要因の詳細情報にドリルダウンします。赤くなっている未処理及び期日超過のFI-AR明細を見てみます。

社内ベンチマークによって組織やオブジェクトタイプごとに比較して、全体で問題があるのかどこか特定の地域や組織のオペレーションに問題があるのかを把握することができます。指標によっては同じ業界企業の中央値等と比較するための業界ベンチマークが用意されています。

修正や先進ソリューションの推奨案
さらにグラフ左上のタブの「修正の推奨案」や「先進ソリューションの推奨案」では、一般的な対応方法や有効なソリューション機能がある場合にその推奨内容を表示します。
「修正の推奨案」で提示されるのは、問題の解決に役立つS/4HANA内の一般的な操作やマスタ整備等による対応です。以下の例では、得意先マスタデータに督促処理に関する設定を行うことなどが挙げられています。

「先進ソリューションの推奨案」タブを選択するとFiori UIによる可視化・分析と実行を融合したアプリ利用による改善案、状況対応（Situation Handling）による例外や異常発生の通知を活用した対応の迅速化、SAP Process Automationを使用した業務処理の自動化、AI機能の活用などのS/4HANAならではの先進機能やBTPの有効活用による解決策が提示されます。

例えばこの債権管理の領域では、S/4HANAを有効に活用していれば顧客の債権に関する情報とステータスを透明化して、支払い約束やクレーム登録、コンタクト履歴の確認等を1画面から実行でき、期日超過を防いだり、問題発生時の解消のための業務オペレーションを効率化できるはずです。しかしそのための標準Fioriアプリや状況対応の機能が活用されていなく、システム外で管理している場合も少なくない領域でもあります。そこでそれらのFioriアプリや状況対応、関連するBusiness AI等が推奨案となっています。

このようにSAP Signavio Process Insights は、現在のERPやS/4HANAの利用状況を可視化し、ボトルネックとなっているプロセス指標の把握と改善のための対応策や最新のソリューション機能の活用を検討することで、S/4HANA移行の検討やその後の継続的な業務改善と高度化を支援します。まずは無償版のdiscovery editionも利用できますので、ぜひご活用を検討してみてください。

entry.title: Re: How to access custom semantic tags created and attach...
entry.content:
Hi

Could you please refer the below link for creating queries with new Semantic tages in S/4HANA Clould Public.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/0778770ccdda45438a271a678efa4aa0.html?version=2408.500&q=created+new+Semantic+tag+group

entry.title: Re: How to Call RESTful APIs from SAP ABAP: A Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content:
Hello @Sefa_Kurtuldu,

Thank you for going through the complete post.Hope you liked it.

I am so grateful for your suggestion and will definitely make the changes.

entry.title: Re: Unleashing ABAP Potential: An introduction to Extension Libraries (XCO)
entry.content:
@tamitdassharma 

I think the idea behind is good, but you should correct some points:

  • AI content must be tagged (Community Guidelines)
  • The XCO_LOG is also not available (CL_BALI_OBJECT_HANDLER)
  • Reference to ABAP Cloud is missing, because that's the point why we need the libraries
  • XCO_* without CP/KU are not released APIs and not useable in ABAP Cloud

When you don't know which library is available, better delete the code, than posting not existing or working code.

entry.title: The system automatically posts where the EBRR (1a) and (2a) account configuration points are
entry.content: #SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 公共版 #SAP S4HANA Cloud 公共版财务#SAP S4HANA Cloud;1K2 - 基于事件的收入确认 - 在销售期间从库存中过账说明；借助基于事件的收入确认 - 库存销售这一新功能，系统在发货时自动过账收入调整（取决于您选择的 EBRR 键）；系统会自动过账 EBRR （1a） 和 （2a） 账户配置点所在的位置

Hi @kevin_li  Really good article for AMS. But I still have a question.

For CAP JAVA project, do we need extra dependency and configuration like in pom.xml or application.yaml?

Regards,

Harvey

entry.title: A detailed list of specific Production Planning (PP) transaction changes
entry.content:
A detailed list of specific Production Planning (PP) transaction changes and guidance on exploring Fiori apps in SAP S/4HANA, including RISE with SAP.

Detailed List of PP Transaction Changes

Material Requirements Planning (MRP):

ECC Transaction Code S/4HANA Equivalent Remarks

MD01 (MRP Run)MD01N (MRP Live)Simplified and optimized for HANA.
MD02 (Single-item, Multi-level)ObsoleteUse MD01N or Fiori app for MRP Live.
MD04 (Stock/Requirements List)MD04 or Fiori appThe existing t-code is enhanced but Fiori is better.
MD05 (Individual Planning)ObsoleteReplaced with MRP Live functionality.
MD06/MD07 (Planning List)SameNo major changes; still supported.

Capacity Planning:

ECC Transaction Code S/4HANA Equivalent Remarks

CM01 (Capacity Evaluation)CM01 or Fiori appEnhanced via Fiori apps for better visuals.
CM21 (Capacity Leveling)SameGUI transaction is still available.
CM25 (Capacity Leveling Graphic)SameUse graphical planning in S/4HANA GUI or Fiori.

Production Orders:

ECC Transaction Code S/4HANA Equivalent Remarks

CO01 (Create Production Order)SameGUI is still supported, and Fiori apps are also available.
CO02 (Change Production Order)SameEnhanced with Fiori app "Manage Production Orders."
CO03 (Display Production Order)SameUse the Fiori app for better visualization.
CO41 (Order Information System)CO41 or Fiori appEnhanced reporting via Fiori apps.

Bills of Material (BOM):

ECC Transaction Code S/4HANA Equivalent Remarks

CS01/CS02/CS03 (Create/Change/Display BOM)SameNo significant changes.
CS11/CS12 (BOM Explosion)SameGUI is supported, but Fiori apps offer advanced analytics.

Work Centers:

ECC Transaction Code S/4HANA Equivalent Remarks

CR01/CR02/CR03 (Create/Change/Display Work Centers)SameNo changes; GUI transactions remain.
CR10 (Capacity Display)Fiori appReplace "Monitor Work Centers" with Fiori.

Production Planning Table:

ECC Transaction Code S/4HANA Equivalent Remarks

MF50 (Planning Table)Same or Fiori appGUI remains but the Fiori app provides enhancements.

Guidance to Explore Fiori Apps for PP

SAP S/4HANA introduces Fiori apps to modernize and streamline production planning processes. Here’s how to explore them:

1. Access the Fiori Launchpad

  • The Fiori Launchpad is the primary interface for accessing Fiori apps.
  • Ask your SAP Basis team for the Fiori URL 

2. Use the Fiori App Library

SAP provides a complete list of available Fiori apps online:

  • Visit the SAP Fiori Apps Library.
  • Steps to explore PP-related apps:
    1. Use the search bar to find apps by keywords like "Production Planning," "MRP," or "Work Centers."
    2. Filter by S/4HANA version and deployment (e.g., RISE with SAP).
    3. Check prerequisites for each app, including roles and authorizations.

3. Key Fiori Apps for Production Planning

App Name Purpose

"Monitor Material Coverage"Replaces MD04 with enhanced analytics.
"Schedule Production Orders"Graphical scheduling and optimization.
"Manage Production Orders"Replaces CO01/CO02/CO03.
"Monitor Work Center Utilization"Visualizes capacity planning.
"Manage Bills of Material"BOM management with a user-friendly interface.
"Analyze Capacity Utilization"Advanced reporting for work centers.

entry.title: Re: Migrating from SAP BW to Datasphere: Using 2LIS_13_VD...
entry.content:
Hi,

We are currently looking at the CDS view CSDBILDOCITMBDX1 which is delta enabled. It contains the same fields as 2LIS_13_VDITM and most of the 2LIS_13_VDHDR fields. The other option is to use SAP BW Bridge (more expensive) where you can still use the the LIS extractors. Datasphere doesn't work anymore with the LIS structures.

Kind regards,

Sander

entry.title: SDP94 Display Layout
entry.content:
Hello,

In SDP94, how to change the table display?  E.g. the order of row title.

entry.title: Re: Use product lifecycle management in ABC XYZ segmentation
entry.content:
When you enable product lifecycle in the segmentation profile, then you would not need to generate data for key figures before segmentation, you can use the reference data directly.

For example:
Product B uses Reference Product A.

  • Segmentation ABC/XYZ uses Sales History as input for ABC segmentation
  • Product A has sales history in the years 2022-2023 and Product B has for year 2024
  • We want to use the full history of the reference, so thereby have Sales History for 2023-2023-2024 when we calculate the segmentation for Product B
  • Therefore, we turn on product lifecycle in the Segmentation Profile.

entry.title: Re: Classic intercompany sales and return with MTO process
entry.content: Blogs are very timely. 👍Because I'm going to use it in the 202408 version of the project

entry.title: How to display work item container value in the flexible workflow notification
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are using standard workflow for Purchase requisition. The email notification is enabled through flexible workflow. Business is looking for some of the work item container values to be available in the email notification. The option "show system fields" is bringing few template values and not the fields from worktime container.

Anybody who encountered this before, please guide how to bring the container value in flexible workflow email notification.

Thanks,

Ramanan

entry.title: Re: 高级公司间库存转储 (5HP) SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: 👍👍👍

entry.title: Re: Migrating from SAP BW to Datasphere: Using 2LIS_13_VD...
entry.content: Thank you for your response. Since LIS structures are no longer supported in SAP Datasphere, it’s clear that CDS views are now the main option for extracting data from SAP S/4HANA.( if no BW Bridge is Procured) However, is there any documentation available that links traditional DataSources to their equivalent CDS views? I haven’t found any such resource yet, and without it, Finding each DataSource manually feels quite challenging for consultants. If such a resource exists, I’d appreciate any guidance on where to find it.

entry.title: Re: ERROR: Upgrading @cap/cds and @cap/cds-dk to version 8
entry.content:
The solution provided via SAP Me:

When using a custom server file (what we do here), the cds.model has to be set manually. This can either be achieved via:

const csn = await cds.load('*')         // or 'cds' in our case
                     .then (cds.minify) 
cds.model = cds.compile.for.nodejs (csn)

or by precompiling the model at build time via an npm script and loading its resulting JSON into cds.model at application startup:

// package.json > scripts
"prebuild": "cds compile cds -4 nodejs -o src/model.json"

// App initialization:
cds.model = require ('./model.json');

The former solution can also meanwhile be found within the CAPire documentation at https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/cds-server#built-in-server-js .

Since @cap-js/cds-types did not support `cds.compile.for.nodejs` and `cds.minify` at the time of issue creation, but in the meantime the respective issue (https://github.com/cap-js/cds-types/issues/292) has been closed and should be available pretty soon.

entry.title: Re: Offline Mass Update of Purchase Contracts through Microsoft Excel
entry.content:
Thanks for this detailed blog. We are using this functionality. But now, businesses also need scale pricing. But it seems like the current version does not support scale pricing. Can someone help me figure out what to do to make this solution work for scale pricing?

I appreciate any suggestion to make it scale pricing work

entry.title: How can i extract data from a table created in Flexible Programming Model custom page?
entry.content:
We have developed a CAPM application using the Flexible Programming Model (FPM) for the UI.
We need to retrieve the data from the table and send it to the backend Node.js layer for further processing. However, we are currently unable to fetch the entire table's data.

In the FPM application, selecting a particular row allows us to retrieve the data from the table, but our requirement is to fetch the entire table's data without selecting a row.

Could someone please help with this?

entry.title: Re: Material Staging in Production Supply Area-WM/PP Integration
entry.content:
Hi Leela,

This is very informative! I have a similar scenario where I am facing a challenge staging for IM location from a WM Location. Could you throw some light on how to configure the process WM-IM staging using MF60?

Thanks,

Kiran Seshi

entry.title: SAP Forms Service by Adobe
entry.content:
Dear Community members/Experts/CAA Team, 

Please help me with my below query -

Under RISE Contract, a customer can generate up-to 200000 forms per month using Adobe forms service as mentioned in the Service Description Guide and this configuration used to be done by the ECS team in a separate BTP account. I understand, now, for the contracts signed after 17-07-2024, this ADS service has to be subscribed in the customer BTP subaccount. My question is, since this is a paid service and if we subscribe this in the customer BTP account, it will incur cost to the customer. In this case, is the entitlement of 200000 forms for the customer still valid? and how the cost is going to be managed if we subscribe to this service in customer BTP subaccount? Please help.

Regards,

Saurav Shubhan

entry.title: Re: Down the rabbit hole: How to get current sap-client programmatically from a controller within SA
entry.content:
How about the following code, which uses a simple standard endpoint that tells you everything you need to know (and more, like sys ID, email, full name, theme, etc. etc.)

const response = await fetch("/sap/bc/ui2/start_up");
const config = await response.json();
const { client } = config;

entry.title: Re: RE-Fx flow type involved when a contract is interrupt...
entry.content: Hello, thanks a lot for your reply, I would need to detect which is exactly the involved Flow Type according with the standard settings for that scenario (I152? More likely than not is a different one). Thanks a lot

entry.title: Updated LJ - Discover the foundations of SAP Commerce Cloud and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Integrations
entry.content:
Hola SAP Community! Fernando at the wheel!

In Abril 2022 we created from scratch a new learning journey: Discover the foundations of SAP Commerce Cloud and SAP S/4HANA Cloud integration, read about the original announcement here.

In April 2023 we updated with major improvements to enhance the learners experience, read about the original announcement here.

This summer, after more than 20,000 learners going over it and have issued almost 700 record of achievement to the learners who have completed the whole course, we've analyzed the feedback given to us by them, and started a another update of the whole course content in order to be always improving our content.

Learning Journey Screenshot
This full course update comes with a long number of changes:

  • Replacing all graphics interactions with explanation videos.
  • Optimized the content order for the units and lessons to be more easily understandable.
  • Providing more fluent text descriptions and narrations for the topics.
  • Updated all resource links, version information and features to the latest SAP Commerce Cloud, S/4HANA Cloud and SAP Cloud Integration sources.
  • Updated the branding for all the content.

So, what are you waiting for? go to SAP Learning site, and enroll for the new updated version of Discovering the Foundations of SAP Commerce Cloud and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Integrations, after completing it... Don't forget to claim your digital badge to show it in your professional social network profile!

I’ll be back very soon to present you new content and updates for SAP Customer Experience Integration and Extensibility learning area: courses, live sessions, micro learnings and any other educational asset which can be interesting for you!

In the mean time, I’ll be looking forward to your feedback and questions via comments here in this post.

entry.title: Issue with Search Functionality in Dynamic Object Card Collection
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m experiencing an issue with the search functionality in my dynamic object card collection. Despite having the search enabled set to true, the search feature doesn’t seem to be working. Whenever I try to search for something, it doesn’t return any results.

Has anyone else encountered this problem? Any suggestions or solutions would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: How to Update DMEE Format CGI_XML_CT to the pain 001....
entry.content:
Hi FelixSchwarzIGB, 

We have uploaded the XML from the note 2253571. Even though the pain number is mentioned as 001.001.03, when we generate the file in the payment run (F110) the xml is generated with the pain001.001.09. We tested the xml structure with the bank and it was approved. 😉

I hope this also helps you!

entry.title: Need multiple batches for source inspection
entry.content:
Hi,
Here's my scenario: I create a purchase order for raw materials, inspect them at the supplier's location before delivery, and I plan to use source inspection.

However, the supplier always delivers the goods in several batches, but when I trigger source inspection (QI07), I have the choice of entering only one batch or without batch.

Despite the fact that I triggered QI07 without Batch, we can enter just one batch number in the inspection lot.

My requirement is to record results for multiple batches using source inspection; how may this be achieved?

entry.title: Re: RE-Fx flow type involved when a contract is interrupt...
entry.content: Hi, To identify the exact flow type being used in your system, please use the transaction REISCEACCDET and input the relevant valuation rule you are using.

entry.title: Product Updates for SAP Build Code – November 2024 Edition
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Welcome to our November release update! We're excited to present you many powerful new features. Whether you're a seasoned developer or just starting your journey, we have something for you. This update features a range of exciting new capabilities, such as adding explanations to SQL statements for SAP HANA Cloud or an update to our Generative AI capabilities for MDK development.

Join us as we explore the details of what's new!

 

SAP HANA Cloud SQL Statement Explanation

The SAP HANA Database Explorer SQL Console in SAP Build Code offers a new feature for adding explanations to SQL statements for SAP HANA Cloud. The explanations can make it easier to understand complex or unfamiliar SQL queries.

The statement explanation feature is triggered by selecting an SQL statement in the SQL console and choosing “Explain SQL Statement using AI” from the menu.

Screenshot: Choosing “Explain SQL Statement using AI” from the Menu

The explanations are added to a copy of the original statement into the SQL console. The copy that contains the explanations is delimited by “AI generated SQL query explanation begins/ends” block comments.

Screenshot: AI Generated SQL Query Explanation

As with all AI generated content the generated comments should be reviewed and checked for validity. If the comments are useful, the original statement may be discarded or combined with the comments as needed.

 

Generative AI Capabilities for MDK

We are thrilled to announce an exciting update to our Generative AI capabilities for MDK (Mobile Development Kit) development. Previously, these capabilities were only available when a single project was opened at the folder level. We have now enhanced this functionality to support more scenarios. Our latest updates now enable you to use Generative AI features when working with multiple projects listed either in the Projects Explorer or at the workspace level.

For example, if you have multiple projects open in the Projects Explorer and want to generate a page in a specific project using the MDK page generation genie, it will now prompt you to select a service file from various service files in multiple projects and a page will be generated in that specific project. This enhancement provides greater flexibility and convenience when working with multiple projects in MDK development.

Screenshot: MDK page generation with Joule

 

Further readings

  • Announcing a New Guide: Deep Dive into SAPUI5 Apps on SAP BTP

We are excited to share a new comprehensive guide crafted by our colleague Matthias Schmalz, offering profound technical insights into SAPUI5 applications running on the SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP). In this guide, Matthias delves into essential topics such as how to structure complex SAPUI5 applications to avoid common pitfalls, how multiple apps work with a shared reuse library and how to integrate business solutions as content providers into SAP Build Work Zone.

For further details, dive into Matthias' guide Designing UI5 Apps as Business Solution for SAP Build Work Zone and elevate your expertise in SAPUI5 development.

 

  • Explore Our Recent SAP Fiori Tools Release

For a deeper dive into the latest updates and features in SAP Fiori tools, be sure to check out the following blog post: SAP Fiori Tools 2411 Update: Enhanced Full-Stack Development, AI Integration, and More Open Source. This post provides a comprehensive overview of the new features and improvements that combine frontend and backend development, broaden AI-driven functionalities, and further the integration of open-source technologies.

 

  •  How to Upgrade Your Existing Standalone Service Plans

SAP Build Code offers different types of service plans in SAP BTP: trial, free and standard. For the initial setup, a booster helps you set up SAP Build Code for the plan you want to use. But what if you already use an existing standalone service plan and want to upgrade to one of the SAP Build Code service plans?

We created the following group: Update from Current Service Plan to Build-Code Service Plan. This group consists of tutorials that guide you step by step through the upgrade process:

  • Add SAP Build Code standard (Application) plan
  • Create an SAP Build Code Standard (Application) Subscription
  • Add build-code service plan
  • Update Service Plan

Our help documentation provides you a list of different current and target service plans and supported migration scenarios.

 

  • Webinar Series What's New in SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 08

Interested in discovering the latest innovations in SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 08? Then join our "What's New in SAP HANA 2.0 SPS 08" webinar series! This series is divided into seven captivating sessions, each filled with insights from over a dozen experts straight from our SAP HANA & Database Product Management team. Dive deep into key updates and features while gaining practical industry knowledge.

 

For further information on new features, please check our roadmaps: roadmap for SAP Build Code, SAPUI5 Road Map. And have a look at What's New in SAP Build Code, the What's New Viewer for SAPUI5 and the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model Release Notes. If you want to stay up-to-date with news, learning resources, and product and strategy updates for SAP Build Code: follow our tag.

We look forward to seeing how you use these new capabilities to create innovative solutions and drive your projects forward. Stay tuned for more updates and happy coding! 😊

entry.title: CATS on GDPR Compliance
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

We have an issue from the Data Protection Team regarding CATS_APPR_LITE and CATS_DA t-codes. As per their statement - if number of hours charged by users are shown to everyone then it is against GDPR. Can you please help us understand if this is really GDPR non-compliance?

Data protection team said the Line Manager can only read and approve the time for their subordinate and the Cost Object Owner can only read and approve the time which booked to their cost object.

This is not happening unless we need to program the logic in CATS. I wonder this kind of requirement why has not been a standard SAP functionality?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner - General Number Settings
entry.content:
Hello @grace_xin 

I know your blog is more than 2 years old, but maybe you still get notified and could have a look into my question?

I've been starting shortly with CVI and one strange thing occurs in my system, where no buffering is set for number range object: BP_PARTNR

I have one specific vendor account group which contains only 1 vendor. This one is supposed to be synchronized into 1 BP with external number assignment. For that, my interval is 600.000 to 600.010.

Initially, I had set it to 600.000 to 600.001, since I expected the one only BP to be created the first number: 600.000 ... however it dumped for an unknown reason.

In the second system copy it worked fine (probably due to the bigger interval), and as well in Dev. and Q system. However: Each and every time, the final number range status is 600.009, even if only 1 single BP got created:

FYI: I checked both above mentioned notes and the setting is definitely "no buffering"! Plus we have only one single application server. The System is ERP 6.0 EHP 8.

So, what is the reason, why the number range status is not 600.001, but it seems it did buffer 10 numbers? There must be another setting somewhere?

Thanks, Martin

entry.title: What is an app for budget and commitment carry forward process in the S/4HANA Public Cloud system?
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

In the Public cloud, I used WBS Element(PS) for control budgeting.

I would like to know the app for carrying forward commitment and budgeting to next year.

Thanks,

May

entry.title: Re: input control not showing data until switching pages
entry.content: thanks, how do I do that?

entry.title: Work Package creation directly from Incident
entry.content:
Introduction

When using Focused Build in an operative enviroment, customers are getting Incidents occuring on the productive system. Some of them need an Urgent Fix using the Change Request and the Urgent Correction of the Fix Pace. But ist also may happen, that it is an unurgent fix or more a new requirement. So it would be usefull to create a Work Package from that incident and attach it to a requirement instead of using a Fix Pace Request of Change. This article explains how to customize that.

Preconditions

You have a Focused Build running, inclusive the Fix Pace and a configured Incident Management with a customer spefific incident (ZMIN). As follow up document you have the Focused Build Change Request available in your incident. 

 Incident with Follow Up Popup

 

Your goal is to have the Work Package available as well.

Work Package available in Follow up Popup

Customizing

You have to perform the following steps.

1. Adjust copy control

2. Map Texts

3. Follow up document with copy routine

1. Adjust copy control 

Call transaction SPRO and move to the following subtree:

SPRO subtree

Call Copy Control Rules

Insert a new entry for S1IT (Work Package) as shown below.

New Copy Control Entry

2. Map Texts

Now you move into your new entry and adjust the mappings of text fields. Put in the following 2 text field entries. You can also add others if necessary.

 

Map text fields

Please save your entries.

3. Follow up document with copy routine

You now have to make the S1IT (Work Package) available as Follow Up document for ZMIN (Incident).

Move to the following SPRO entry:

SPRO entry for 'Follow Up Documents'

Create the following new entry:

New Follow Up document entry

You now have the Work Package available as Follow Up Document to the Incident.

Follow Up Pop Up with Work Package

Using Work Packages created as Follow Up

When creating such a Work Package you need to fill in the mandatory fields and save the Work Package.

Mandatory fields in Work Package

If you have the 'Open in UI5 App' button available in your current Business Role you can proceed the Work Package there. 

'Open in UI 5 App' button

Otherwise you need to switch your business role in the WEBUI to get the Work Package shown properly. There you have also the UI5 App button.

Switching Business role to Architect

Now you can use the Work Package in UI5.

Work Package in UI5

Assigning Work Package to a Requirement

The created Work Package is a Work Package withoit a requirement. But you can assign to a requirment in the Requirement Management.

Open Requirement Management Tile

Search for your requirement and choose 'Assign Work Package'.

Requriements Management

Put in the Work Package Number and assign the Work Package.

 

Work Package Assignment Pop Up

Your Work Package is now assigned to the Requirement.

Assigned Work Package

 

Conclusion

You are now able to create Work Package out of Incidents and you have a link between these two tickets.

You can close the Incident after the Work Package Creation as the Incident status will not be changed by the Work Package. 

If you have any questions or input, please feel free to comment and share!

You are also encouraged to follow SAP Solution Manager tag here and the Application Lifecycle Management tag here.

entry.title: Re: /SCWM/ISU can't post with external amount
entry.content:
Hi 

We have a note 3445575 - EWM Initial Stock Upload with External Amount in Local Currency. I am writing cause and solution part. Check if you followed it. I also have blog . note sure if it is allowed . please check if it is see and compare your steps

Cause
This functionality is not available in the EWM standard until S/4HANA 2021 release. Before that, the EWM standard design did not foresee any price management. Every stock posting from EWM had to be done based on the existing price data on ERP side.

Resolution
Before upgrading to a higher release, implement BAdI /SCWM/EX_ERP_GOODSMVT_EXT to update the price-related fields AMOUNT_LC and AMOUNT_SV in table CT_GOODSMVT_ITEM for every item to be posted.

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-q-a/initial-stock-upload-with-map-by-disconnecting-ecc-ewm/qaq-p/12693613

https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/how-upload-project-stock-from-ewm-external-amount-local-mishra-byn3f

 

Regards

Rashid

entry.title: Re: Unable to Use {*} and {**} Operators in APIRule v2alp...
entry.content:
Dear Abhinav,

The planned rollout was on 27.11 (yesterday), so it should already be available. You should re-check if the issue persists.

Best regards,

Bartosz

entry.title: Urgent help - SAP Standard BAPI/FM to update LIPS-MBDAT - Staging date of a delivery item
entry.content:
Hi Experts, ABAP Development 

Is any FM/BAPI is there to update staging date(LIPS-MBDAT) of a delivery at item level?

I have seen many links with similar question but there is no answer posted.

 I tried with WB2_PROCESS_DL_ITEM_CHANGE and WB2_ADD_ON_CHANGE_DL but nothing is worked.

I dont want to go with BDC or direct table updates. Please let me know if there is any other way to update this field.

entry.title: Re: Active/Active Read enabled option
entry.content:
Hi,

I don't think you can connect to secondary DB via SAPGUI directly.
I did a test in my local system and it works by following below steps.
1. add secondary DB as a secondary connection in DBCO.
2. in DBACOCKPIT, under "System Configuration", add a new system, choose the Database Connection which was created in above step.
3. Then connect to the secondary DB via button "Connect to Database".

Best regards,
Charles

entry.title: Re: Fetch data in ABAP, using SDA connection
entry.content:
hi @nagaraosunkara ,
you may refer to the other posting: 

ABAP access to SDA virtual table 

Carine gave a hint. I did not try it yet but it sounds reasonable.

br

christian

#SDA #smartdataaccess #HANA #AMDP

entry.title: Re: In which table RFHA & BELNR exist together for treasury module ?
entry.content: Get below values from VTBFHAPO and CONCAT them. VTBFHAPO-<ALL KEYS FIELDS>{BUKRS+RFHA+RFHAZU+DCRDAT+TCRTIM+RFHAZB} (All values with CONVERSION ROUTINE "ALPHA" i.e. with LEADING ZEROS) Pass it to External Business Transaction ID in TRDV_TRANS_FLOW (TRDV_TRANS_FLOW-EXTBUSTRANSID) Get the Business Transaction ID from TRDV_TRANS_FLOW (TRDV_TRANS_FLOW-BUSTRANSID) Pass Business Transaction ID to TRACV_DOC_ITEM (TRACV_DOC_ITEM-BUSTRANSID) and get TRACV_DOC_ITEM-BELNR

entry.title: Re: EWM inbound delivery not getting created against purc...
entry.content: Have you configured correct Document type and item type and check wpt determination

entry.title: Re: BELNR field is not getting updated in VTBFHAPO table
entry.content:
BELNR is not getting updated in VTBFHAPO. If you want to get BELNR, please follow the below path.

Get below values from VTBFHAPO and CONCAT them.

VTBFHAPO-<ALL KEYS FIELDS>{BUKRS+RFHA+RFHAZU+DCRDAT+TCRTIM+RFHAZB}

(All values with CONVERSION ROUTINE "ALPHA" i.e. with LEADING ZEROS)

 

Pass it to External Business Transaction ID in TRDV_TRANS_FLOW

(TRDV_TRANS_FLOW-EXTBUSTRANSID)

 

Get the Business Transaction ID from TRDV_TRANS_FLOW (TRDV_TRANS_FLOW-BUSTRANSID)

 

Pass Business Transaction ID to TRACV_DOC_ITEM (TRACV_DOC_ITEM-BUSTRANSID) and get

BELNR(TRACV_DOC_ITEM-BELNR)

entry.title: Re: Cannot Download AdobeForm Template from SAP Business...
entry.content:
Hello,

when you download the template, it downloads the ZIP file. You can extract the ZIP file and look for file with extension .xdp. 
If the ZIP file is empty then there could be different reason.
1) If you are trying to download the form template created by Cloud Application studio, then it may not be possible to do so directly from UI using Business users.
2) if its a standard form, Raise an incident to SAP.

Regards,
Harshal
